title: Robi’s Q1 profit jumps 85% on AI-driven offers
description: Robi Axiata posted a sharp rise in profit in the first quarter of 2026, as AI-driven personalised offers and disciplined cost management cushioned the impact of adverse economic conditions.

title: Robi profit skyrockets 85% to Tk232cr in Q1 on data surge, cost discipline
description: Robi shares closed at Tk29.60 on Thursday
